Grid.Opacity: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource TemplatedParent}, Path=IsChecked, Converter={BoolToDoubleConverter TrueValue=1, FalseValue=0.4}}
{Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource TemplatedParent}, Path=IsChecked, Converter={BoolToDoubleConverter TrueValue=1, FalseValue=0.4}}

Viewbox.Visibility: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=TemplatedParent}, Path=HideCheckbox, Converter={SHBoolToVisibilityConverter Invert=true, Hide=true}}
{Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=TemplatedParent}, Path=HideCheckbox, Converter={SHBoolToVisibilityConverter Invert=true, Hide=true}}
